nodes.label: Tech Stack (Fastify + React SPA + PostgreSQL + Redis + Prisma)
Product UI (Dashboard, Gap Tracker, Tasks, Connections, Outreach, Negotiations)
Rationale: Never skip pre-render (crawlers get empty HTML)
Programmatic Page Infrastructure (compare, niche, rates, threshold, research)
Rationale: Permit AI search visibility; accept training as cost
Copy Rule: No Em-dashes or En-dashes
Copy Rule: Number Formatting (under 10 as words)
Voice Rule: Creator-Centric Framing (5k-50k sub creators)
Voice Rule: Specific Over Vague (numbers, names, dates)
AI for Creators Digest Schedule (Thursdays 8am UK)
Creator Economy Digest Scope (1k-100k subscribers, UK+US)
Editorial Draft Structure (claim, reasoning, example, implication)
Listmonk Posting Rule: Always Draft, Never Auto-send
Curation Volume Target (8-12 items per digest)
Subject Line Rule: 30-55 Characters, Lowercase Preferred
Summarisation Rule: Max 2 Sentences Per Item
Source Credibility Tiers (1.0 official to 0.2 social)
Voice Memory Rule: Editorial Decisions Only (not facts)
Voice Memory Rule: Deprecate Never Delete
Rationale: Knowledge must generalise, not describe events
Rationale: Email must sound like the creator wrote it (not corporate script)
Rationale: Never apologise for the rate (undermines negotiation position)
Niche Categories (gaming, lifestyle, tech, fitness, beauty, finance, other)
Rationale: Classify by content IS (not what creator wishes), weight titles most
Rationale: Lead with implication not statistics in pattern summaries
Rationale: Correct information asymmetry (creators don't know what brands open with)
Rationale: Honest framing over false precision (low confidence estimates still useful)

hyperedges.label: AI for Creators Digest Full Workflow
